memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:1:40.snippet: # 2026-04-24 - Jason's Glass Tint Website Project ## Session Work Built a premium, modern website for Jason's Glass Tint (Vance's father's business) in Orange County, CA. ### Project Details - **Business:** Jason's Glass Tint - window tinting specialist - **Phone:** 949-496-8468 - **Service Areas:** San Clemente, Talega, Dana Point, San Juan Capistrano, Laguna Niguel, Orange County - **Specialties:** Tesla & luxury vehicle tinting, residential, commercial, marine tint - **Brand:** 30+ years experience, one-man shop (Jason only), 100,000+ windows tinted, premium film only ### Website Features Delivered 1. **Premium Design** - Dark/light gradient hero with overlay - Cyan accent color
